scores.notes: Uses legacy install+config-changed pattern instead of modern CollectStatusEvent. Critical logic flaw: the install handler always sets ActiveStatus regardless of whether 'name' config is empty, so a charm installed with an empty name config would show Active until a config-changed fires. Gold standard's collect_unit_status approach avoids this race. The charmcraft.yaml description mentions K8s charm but containers/resources are not explicitly confirmed. All described APIs (self.unit.status, WaitingStatus, ActiveStatus) are valid ops APIs.
